message:
fix(summary): propagate time and agent filters into workspace/agent sub-queries

The workspace summary and agent summary sections were computing message
counts and sample titles using unfiltered queries — they joined messages
to conversations but did not apply the active time/agent/workspace filters
from the parent query. This caused misleading counts when users applied
`--since` or other filter flags: the top-level conversation counts were
correct but the nested message counts and sample titles reflected the
entire unfiltered dataset.

Introduces `prepend_param()` helper to build parameter vectors that
prepend a workspace/agent binding before the shared filter params, then
threads the `where_clause` into both the message-count and sample-titles
sub-queries for workspace and agent breakdowns.

- Adds test_workspace_summary_message_counts_respect_time_filter
- Adds test_agent_summary_message_counts_respect_time_filter
- Both tests set since_ts and assert that only matching conversations
  and messages appear in the summary output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
